rows.title: For individual dentists
rows.description: Is paperwork stealing your time while patients leave confused?

cards.title: Wasted time
cards.text: You spend too much chair time explaining plans patients still can’t visualize.

cards.title: Low clarity
cards.text: Text-heavy or handwritten plans make complex treatments harder to understand.

cards.title: Poor presentation
cards.text: Messy, inconsistent documents make even great dentistry look unprofessional.

rows.title: For dental clinics [br] Small to large
rows.description: When your team works from one clear plan, the entire clinic runs smoother.

cards.title: No standard
cards.text: Unclear plans slow consultations, lower case acceptance, and make revenue harder to predict.

cards.title: Team friction
cards.text: You spend too much chair time explaining plans patients still can’t visualize.

cards.title: Weak brand
cards.text: Inconsistent formats and branding weaken trust and your clinic’s professional image.

cards.title: Хотите, чтобы пациенты сразу понимали и соглашались?
cards.description: Меньше путаницы. Меньше трения. [br] Больше принятых планов лечения.

cards.label: TX Plan Pro
cards.description: Создаёт планы лечения в том виде, как вы сами привыкли думать и объяснять их пациентам.

cards.title: Upload patient data
cards.description: Quickly upload diagnostics and patient information.

cards.title: AI analyzes the case
cards.description: Our AI evaluates the clinical data and builds a treatment structure.

cards.title: Review treatment plan
cards.description: Edit and refine the suggested treatment plan.

cards.title: Visual explanation
cards.description: Show the patient a clear and visual explanation.

cards.title: Patient approval
cards.description: Patients clearly understand and approve the plan.

cards.title: Start treatment
cards.description: Begin treatment with full clarity and documentation.

cards.title: How it looks & feels
cards.description: Designed to reduce friction for you and your patients.

cards.label: No installation
cards.title: Start instantly
cards.description: Open the app and begin creating plans right away. No installation, no IT headaches.

cards.label: Adapts to workflow
cards.title: Matches how you think
cards.description: A clear, step-by-step structure that follows how you actually think and explain.

cards.label: No distraction
cards.title: Clean & focused design
cards.description: Modern layout that keeps attention on the case, not on the tool.

cards.label: Better decisions
cards.title: Less cognitive load
cards.description: The interface helps you stay focused, reduces stress for your team, and makes plans easier for patients to follow.

rows.title: More time with patients –Less time on paperwork
rows.description: Create clear, visual treatment plans in minutes — without slowing down your day

rows.title: Plan treatments the way you actually think
rows.description: Structure complex cases step-by-step, without messy notes or screenshots

rows.title: Make better clinical decisions and get more patient “yes”
rows.description: Clear visuals reduce objections and support stronger treatment outcomes

rows.title: They finally understand – Not guess
rows.description: Visual plans make complex care clear and approachable

rows.title: They know exactly what they’re paying for
rows.description: Transparent steps and costs remove uncertainty and stress

rows.title: They feel confident in your care and recommend you
rows.description: Clarity builds trust, and trust builds lasting loyalty

rows.title: Smoother operations with fewer mistakes
rows.description: Standardized plans reduce staff friction, rework, and coordination issues

rows.title: Higher case acceptance and stronger retention
rows.description: Clear communication leads to more approvals and more loyal patients

rows.title: More predictable consistent revenue
rows.description: Structured, visual, and branded plans make outcomes and cash flow easier to forecast

cards.title: Ever wish your patients truly understood and agreed instantly?
Start instantly – fully online
cards.description: Create your account and begin using TxPlanPro right away. Everything works online: no waiting, no approvals, no manual setup required.

cards.title: Customize it for your clinic
cards.description: If you want, our team will help tailor your templates aligning them with your branding, preferred workflows, and documentation style.

cards.title: Simple training for your team
cards.description: Quick remote training gets everyone up to speed – no technical expertise required.

cards.title: Support wherever you need it
cards.description: Access our knowledge base anytime, or reach out to our team if you need help.

cards.title: Secure & reliable by design
cards.description: Your data is protected with automatic backups and built-in safeguards that minimize errors.

cards.title: Constantly getting better
cards.description: TxPlanPro evolves based on real clinic feedback, with new features carefully tested before release.

top.title: Developed by clinicians
top.description: Built by practicing dentists who know how treatment planning actually works in real clinics under real time pressure, with real patients and real teams.

bottom.title: Clinical logic first
bottom.description: Clear, step-by-step plans that follow how dentists actually think.

bottom.title: Evidence-based
bottom.description: Structured around clinical reasoning for better decisions, not guesswork.

bottom.title: Smart flexibility
bottom.description: A clear framework that still adapts to unique, patient-specific cases.

cards.name: Dr. Michael Anderson
cards.text: TxPlanPro has completely transformed the way we present treatment plans in our clinic. The application is intuitive, professional, and saves us an incredible amount of time. I’ve had a great experience.
